title: Hay Fever
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Hay fever is allergic rhinitis triggered by pollen or other allergens.
Symptoms can include sneezing, runny or stuffy nose, cough, postnasal drip, itchy eyes, nose, or throat, and watery eyes.
Avoiding triggers and using clinician-recommended allergy treatment can help symptoms.
